arts.ttl: Real Madrid icon Zinedine Zidane tipped for sensational return to former team
arts.sum: Zinedine Zidane, who has only ever managed former club Real Madrid and hasn’t coached since 2021, now has a clear path to become the new man in charge of the France national team after Didier Deschamps announced he would be stepping down after the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Additionally, Zidane reportedly rejected the chance to become USMNT coach after the 2022 FIFA World Cup .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid learn length of Vinicius Junior suspension after Valencia red card
arts.sum: Real Madrid learn the length of Vinicius Junior's suspension after his red card against Valencia.

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Ederson: The new Casemiro for Real Madrid?
arts.sum: Atalanta's Brazilian midfielder Ederson has emerged as a key player following two encounters with Real Madrid that showcased his talent. The 25-year-old faced the Spanish giants twice in recent months, first in the UEFA Super Cup and then in the Champions League, where he impressed despite his team's losses. The post Atalanta’s Ederson: The new Casemiro for Real Madrid? appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid is inevitable: Insulting January bid the first sign that Florentino Perez is locked in on Liverpool star
arts.sum: When Trent Alexander-Arnold pinged the ball into the back of the net - via a handsome deflection - during Liverpool's 5-0 win over West Ham on December 30, he ran to the corner flag in celebration, throwing up a gesture that seemed to suggest that he was aware of the talk surrounding a transfer to Real Madrid . Seven days on from his West Ham goal, and less than a week after it emerged that Madrid had bid around £20 million ($25m) to secure his services this January, Alexander-Arnold's subpar showing rendered any previous celebrations irrelevant.

arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: Real Madrid vs. UD Levante; Liga F
arts.sum: Like Real Madrid, the Granotas have already played their first game of 2025 - another postponed fixture. On January 5th the Valencian derby took place which Levante lost and are now tied in points with the 15-placed Depor in the relegation zone.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Real Madrid speak out on Virgil van Dijk amid Elon Musk interest
arts.sum: Liverpool continue negotiations to keep Mo Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Virgil van Dijk, while the world's richest man, Elon Musk, is interested in buying the club

arts.ttl: Real Madrid lineup vs. Mallorca: Predicted XI for Spanish Super Cup semi-final but will Vinicius Junior be available?
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Real Madrid could line up for Thurday's Spanish Super Cup semi-final against Mallorca.

arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 5-0 win vs Deportiva Minera
arts.sum: Real Madrid maintained their strong form in a resounding 5-0 win over fourth-division side Deportiva Minera in the Copa Del Rey round of 32 on Monday night. Endrick actually had a good statistical game — which is what was expected, as he was facing a fourth-division side — but he just could not find the back of the net as each time he came close, Martinez became the second-coming of Endrick’s Belgian teammate Thibaut Courtois.

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid have made ‘important offers’ for Alan Godoy
arts.sum: Spanish football’s two biggest clubs have made contact over the potential signing of Eldense youngster Alan Godoy. That’s according to Relevo, who have on Tuesday provided an insight into the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona take note: Real Madrid learn extent of Vinícius Jr’s ban
arts.sum: Real Madrid have on Tuesday evening learned the extent of the punishment handed down to star attacker Vinícius Jr. This of course comes on the back of the red card…
